title: SchemaDefinition
description: The extraction tool registered with the Claude Messages API. name is fixed at 'extract_record' for this kata; input_schema is the frozen output of ExtractedRecord.model_json_schema() (D-002), enforcing FR-001 (formal schema). The description field doubles as Principle VIII documentation of what the tool extracts.

name.description: Fixed tool name for this kata. Matched against the returned tool_use block's name.

description.description: Tool description handed to the model. Also states which fields are guaranteed vs. optional and what the escape options mean (FR-009, Principle VIII).

input_schema.description: The input_schema passed to the tool is the ExtractedRecord schema itself — same object, no drift (D-002). FR-001, FR-010.
